fest, easiest choice?

For a first-timer, the Mesa Loop 30oz is a fantastic choice! It’s super easy to use, fits in most car cup holders, and keeps your drinks hot or cold for hours. The lid is simple and secure, and you can pop it in the dishwasher (top rack) for easy cleaning. It’s one of our most popular, reliable options—perfect for getting started!

turns.q: What do beginners usually say about it in reviews?
turns.replyTail:
it in reviews?

Beginners usually say the Mesa Loop 30oz is super easy to use, keeps drinks hot or cold for a long time, and fits well in most cup holders. People love that the lid is leak-proof and simple to clean (just toss it on the top rack of your dishwasher). With a 4.7 out of 5 rating from over 500 reviews, most new users find it dependable and a great value for starting out!

turns.q: Is there anything else a beginner needs to get started?
turns.replyTail:
anything else a beginner needs to get started?

Honestly, you don’t need anything extra to get started! The Mesa Loop 30oz comes ready to use right out of the box—just wash it before your first use, fill it up with your favorite drink, and you’re good to go.

If you ever want to personalize your bottle or try different lids or accessories, you can always explore those options later, but they aren’t necessary for beginners. If you have any other questions or want tips, just ask!
